---
name: "\U0001F4A1 功能请求 / Feature Request"
about: 提出新功能建议 / Suggest an idea for this project
title: "\U0001F4A1 功能请求 / Feature Request (功能 / Feature:)"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 功能描述 / Feature Description
清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能。
A clear and concise description of what you want.

## 🎯 使用场景 / Use Case
这个功能用于解决什么问题？谁会使用它？
What problem does this feature solve? Who will use it?

## 🔄 替代方案 / Alternatives
你考虑过的其他解决方案。
Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## 📝 补充说明 / Additional Context
任何其他相关信息或截图。
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

**Note:** You can fill in either Chinese or English. Both are welcome.
**提示：** 你可以使用中文或英文填写，我们都欢迎。
